title: TVS Motor International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: TVS Motor International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, TVS Motor International Enterprises in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About TVS Motor International Enterprises:
TVS Motor International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Motor International Enterprises!
